text.title: lint-autofix-vs-flag-decision-rule Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lint-autofix-vs-flag-decision-rule as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Letting the agent auto-apply any fix that "looks small" without running the tests after.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Autofix can break runtime behaviour — e.g., noqa: F401 removed by --remove-unused-imports may turn out to be a side-effect import. Tests are the only guard.

failure-mode.description: Letting the agent auto-bump a dependency to "fix" a CVE when no patched version exists.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The agent picks a pre-release or a fork without security review; the CVE is "closed" but the supply-chain risk is now larger.
